title: Power Query bridge — hashes.json (HELM-P4-B1, FROZEN v1)
description: One row per evidence-bundle entry, splitting the algorithm-prefixed digest into columns a spreadsheet formula can use directly (e.g. VLOOKUP against an external hash list). Joins to results.json and trust-labels.json on `digest`. FROZEN: any shape change is a major-version bump (see docs/POWER-QUERY-BRIDGE.md) — never edit fields in place.
